| deity = {{ill|Hachiman|lt=Hachiman|ar|هاتشيمان|az|Haçiman|ca|Hachiman|de|Hachiman|el|Χατσίμαν|en|Hachiman|es|Hachiman|eu|Hachiman|fa|هاچیمان|fi|Hachiman|fr|Hachiman|hu|Hacsiman|id|Hachiman|it|Hachiman|ja|八幡神|ko|하치만 신|mni|ꯍꯆꯤꯃꯥꯟ|my|ဟချိမန်း|pl|Hachiman|pt|Hachiman|ru|Хатиман|simple|Hachiman|sl|Hačiman|sv|Hachiman|tr|Hachiman|uk|Хачіман|uz|Hachiman|vi|Hachiman|wuu|八幡神|zh|八幡神|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hachiman Shrine (Mikajiri)'''|八幡神社(三ヶ尻)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|fa|معبد هاچیمان|fr|Sanctuaire Hachiman|it|Santuario di Hachiman|ja|八幡宮|simple|Hachiman shrines|vi|Đền thờ thần Hachiman|zh|八幡宮|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11546334|ltq=Q11546334|qid=Q11546334|1=List of Shikinaisha in Musashi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 31
** P155: {{ill|Q135039743|ltq=Q135039743|qid=Q135039743|1=Shirakamino Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Nireyama Shrine|lt=Nireyama Shrine|ja|楡山神社|qid=Q134887071|1=Nireyama Shrine}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Q261637|ltq=Q261637|qid=Q261637|1=Hachiman}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181719
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
